home.install.subtitle: Install the PWA
home.hero.description:
Join the decentralized geocaching adventure powered by Nostr.
Hide geocaches, find them, and connect with explorers worldwide.
home.hero.descriptionAdventure:
Join a fellowship of geocachers on an ancient quest powered by mystical networks.
Conceal geocaches, discover legendary geocaches, and forge bonds with fellow adventurers across the realm.
home.features.title: Why Treasures?
home.features.decentralized.title: Decentralized
home.features.decentralized.description: Your geocaches are stored on the Nostr network, ensuring they're always accessible and censorship-resistant.
home.features.decentralized.descriptionA: Your geocaches are safeguarded by mystical networks, ensuring they remain eternal and beyond the reach of dark forces.
home.features.community.title: Community Driven
home.features.community.description: Connect with fellow geocachers, share experiences, and build lasting friendships through adventure.
home.features.community.descriptionAdven: Unite with fellow adventurers, share tales of glory, and forge unbreakable bonds through epic quests.
home.features.global.title: Global Adventure
home.features.global.description: Discover caches hidden by explorers from around the world, each with its own unique story and challenge.
home.features.global.descriptionAdventur: Uncover geocaches concealed by legendary explorers across distant lands, each bearing ancient secrets and trials.
home.recent.title: Recently Hidden Geocaches
home.recent.description: Discover the newest geocaches hidden by adventurers around the world. Each one waiting for you to find it.
home.recent.descriptionAdventure: Uncover the latest geocaches concealed by legendary explorers across the realm. Each one holds ancient secrets awaiting discovery.
claim.title: Claim Treasure
claim.description: To claim a treasure (log a verified find), use the QR code within the geocache.
claim.instructions.mobile: Use your camera to scan the QR code - it will should automatically detect it!
claim.instructions.desktop: Use your phone's camera to scan the QR code, then enter the link below
claim.scan.description.mobile: Most camera apps can automatically detect QR codes or include a 'QR Scan' mode
claim.scan.description.desktop: Use your mobile device to scan the QR code
claim.step1.desktop: Get your phone and open the Camera app
claim.step1.hint.mobile: The default camera app works best
claim.step1.hint.desktop: Most phones have QR scanning built-in
claim.step2.title: Point the camera at the QR code
claim.step2.hint: Make sure the entire QR code is visible and well-lit
claim.step3.desktop: Copy the treasure link that appears
claim.step3.hint.mobile: Your phone will show a notification to open the link
claim.step3.hint.desktop: Then paste it in the form below
claim.proTips.title: Pro Tips:
claim.proTips.tip1: Hold your phone steady about 6-12 inches from the QR code
claim.proTips.tip2: Make sure there's good lighting (avoid shadows and glare)
claim.proTips.tip3: If it doesn't work immediately, try moving slightly closer or further away
claim.proTips.tip4: If scanning fails, you can manually type the URL below
claim.manual.description.mobile: You can open the link from your phone's camera directly, or paste the URL provided here
claim.manual.description.desktop: After scanning with your phone, paste the treasure link here
claim.manual.label: Treasure Link
claim.manual.example: The link should look like this:
claim.toast.found.title: Treasure found!
claim.toast.invalid.title: Invalid URL
claim.toast.invalid.description: This URL is not a valid treasure verification link.
claim.toast.invalid.missingKey: This URL appears to be incomplete. Please make sure you copied the complete link from the QR code.
claim.toast.invalid.wrongFormat: This URL may be outdated or incorrect. Please scan the QR code again and copy the complete link.
claim.error.qrMustPointToTreasures: QR code must point to treasures.to
claim.error.noVerificationKey: No verification key found in QR code

about.title: About Treasures
about.subtitle: Decentralized geocaching on the Nostr protocol
about.geocaching.title: What is Geocaching?
about.geocaching.description1: Geocaching is a real-world treasure hunting game where participants use GPS coordinates to find hidden containers called "geocaches" or "caches." These containers are placed by other geocachers and can be found in urban areas, parks, forests, and remote locations around the world.
about.geocaching.description2: Each geocache contains a logbook where finders can record their visit, and larger caches may contain small trinkets for trading. The game combines outdoor adventure, problem-solving, and exploration, encouraging people to discover new places and hidden gems in their communities.
about.treasures.title: What is Treasures?
about.treasures.description1: Treasures is a decentralized geocaching platform built on the Nostr protocol. Unlike traditional geocaching platforms that rely on centralized servers, Treasures uses a network of relays to store and distribute geocache data, making it censorship-resistant and globally accessible.
about.treasures.description2: With Treasures, you can create, find, and log geocaches using your Nostr identity. The platform supports real-time updates and seamless integration with the broader Nostr ecosystem. Your geocaching activity is tied to your cryptographic identity, ensuring authenticity while maintaining privacy.
about.treasures.feature1.title: Decentralized
about.treasures.feature2.title: Censorship Resistant
about.treasures.feature3.title: Community Owned
about.treasures.feature4.title: Real-time Updates
about.cacheTypes.title: Supported Cache Types
about.cacheTypes.description: Treasures supports the most popular geocache types
about.cacheTypes.traditional.title: Traditional
about.cacheTypes.traditional.description: The classic geocache type. A container hidden at the given coordinates with a logbook inside.
about.cacheTypes.multi.title: Multi-Cache
about.cacheTypes.multi.description: A sequence of locations leading to the final cache. Solve clues at each stage to find the next.
about.cacheTypes.mystery.title: Mystery
about.cacheTypes.mystery.description: Puzzle caches that require solving a mystery or puzzle to determine the final coordinates.
about.tech.title: What is Treasures built with?
about.tech.description1: Treasures is built on the Nostr protocol, a simple, open protocol that enables global, decentralized, and censorship-resistant communication. Nostr leverages a network of relays to create applications that can't be shut down or controlled by any single entity.
about.tech.description2.prefix: The application was created using the
about.tech.description2.suffix: a powerful toolkit for building Nostr applications with modern web technologies.
about.tech.feature1.title: Nostr Protocol
about.tech.feature2.title: Modern Stack
about.tech.feature3.title: Open Source
about.tech.feature4.title: Real-time
about.nip.title: What kind of events does this site use? Is there a NIP?
about.nip.description: Treasures uses custom Nostr event kinds defined in NIP-GC (Geocaching Events). This specification defines how geocaches and logs are stored and shared across the Nostr network.
about.nip.kind1.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind1.description: Geocache listings with location, difficulty, terrain, and cache details
about.nip.kind2.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind2.description: Found logs recording successful geocache visits
about.nip.kind3.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind3.description: Verification events providing cryptographic proof of cache finds
about.nip.kind4.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind4.description: Comment logs for DNF, notes, and maintenance reports
about.footer.description: Treasures is open source and community-driven.
